Skip to contents
moon 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Getting started with MOON
    • Customizing MOON
  • Changelog

Package index

Run a model

Top-level entry points for deterministic and probabilistic simulation of the MOON Markov cohort model.

moon_deterministic()
Run a deterministic MOON simulation
moon_psa()
Run a probabilistic sensitivity analysis (PSA) on a MOON spec
run_markov_engine()
Run the raw MOON Markov engine

Build parameters

Build the bundled Norwegian default parameter set, define parametric uncertainty for PSA, and validate params lists.

moon_params_norway()
Build a Norwegian default params list
moon_param_fixed()
Spec for a value that is uncertain in principle but pinned for this run
moon_param_lognormal()
Lognormal spec from a point estimate and a 95% confidence interval
moon_param_gamma()
Moment-matched gamma spec from per-cell means and standard errors
moon_param_mvnorm()
Multivariate-normal spec for survival-model coefficients
moon_param_dirichlet()
Dirichlet spec for simplex-valued parameters
moon_param_value() moon_param_sample()
MOON parameter spec class system
moon_sample_params()
Materialise a spec'd params list into n concrete draws
moon_check_params()
Validate a MOON params list

Inspect results

Extractors and S3 methods over moon_deterministic and moon_psa objects.

moon_prevalence()
Compute prevalence by age and state from a deterministic run
moon_costs()
Aggregate cohort costs by age, state, sex, or total
print(<moon_deterministic>) summary(<moon_deterministic>) print(<summary.moon_deterministic>) as.data.frame(<moon_deterministic>) plot(<moon_deterministic>)
Methods for moon_deterministic objects
print(<moon_psa>) summary(<moon_psa>) as.data.frame(<moon_psa>) plot(<moon_psa>)
Methods for moon_psa objects

Package data

BMI cut-off reference datasets shipped with the package; used by a future moon_classify_bmi() and not by the engine itself.

moon_who_cutoffs
Adult BMI cut-offs (WHO)
moon_iotf_cutoffs
Cole/IOTF child BMI cut-offs (LMS-based, ages 2–18, both sexes)

On this page

Developed by Nicolai Damslund, Gudrun M W Bjørnelv, Yufei Jiang, Magnus Skov Larsen, Christina Hansen Edwards, Vidar Halsteinli, Rønnaug A Ødegaard, Line Planck Kongstad.
